---
title: "Education"
---

## Degrees

| Year  | Degree | Institution |
|:-|:----|:------|
| 2011  | B.Sc Actuarial Science  | North-West University, Potchefstroom |
| 2012  | BCom Honours Statistics | University of Cape Town |
| 2014  | M.Sc (Statistics) | University of Cape Town|
|2020   | Ph.D (Statistics) | University of Cape Town |


## Awards
*2025* 

Distinguished Teachers Award in the Faculty of Science  <break>  
University of Witwatersrand 



## Visits

| Dates            | Institution       | Country   | Host |
|:-----------------|:------------------|:----------|:----------|
| May 2025         | Monash University | Australia | Prof. Di Cook |
| April 2024       | Stellenbosch University | South Africa | Prof S Lubbe |
| July 2024        | Stellenbosch University | South Africa | Prof S Lubbe |
